title: (Bullish Signal) CLF, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling CLF's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. tickeron's A.I. dvisor identified 46 similar cases where CLF's MACD histogram became positive, and 40 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 87%. Current price $17.88 is above $12.99 the highest support line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 12/03/20 - 01/06/21, the price experienced a +45% Uptrend. During the week of 12/29/20 - 01/06/21, the stock enjoyed a +27% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/yn920gjxmy961.png?width=1525&format=png&auto=webp&s=5f78ac579928b7dcb0306992108f5bccacb1e766

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

CLF moved above its 50-day Moving Average on September 28, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for CLF crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on August 17, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 13 of 18 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 72%.

The 50-day Moving Average for CLF moved above the 200-day moving average on September 11, 2020. This could be a long-term bullish signal for the stock as the stock shifts to an upward trend.

Following a +20.80% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where CLF advanced for three days, in 240 of 288 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 187 of 236 cases where CLF Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 79%.
